height_to_width.desc: 塔高/底边（法门寺塔约 47m / 底径 ~10m，明显竖向）

floor_count.desc: 密檐层数（法门寺现塔 13 层）

floor_height.desc: 每层檐口节奏（密檐，层高低）

window_wall_ratio.desc: 券形假窗/真窗占比（砖塔立面实墙为主）

aiInstruction: Famen Temple relic pagoda (Tang brick dense-eaves pagoda). RECOMMENDED: MODULE + landmark:giant_wild_goose_pagoda with params.levels=13, height≈47, baseWidth≈10, facing=SOUTH, detailLevel=refined. Output proportion_hints: typology=famen_pagoda, floor_count=13, slenderness≈4.7, setback_ratio≈0.06. style_profile Chinese_Traditional; wall=brick/stone, roof=dark_glazed_tile; decorative_elements bracket_sets,eaves,cornice,stupa_finial. Compositional fallback: layout.skeleton_type=VERTICAL_STACK; MASS width=depth with params.setback_ratio + tiered masses[] OR stacked ROOF eaves per floor; shape=circle as octagon approximation. FORBID: CROWN crown_template=CLASSICAL_CUPOLA|ONION_DOME, generic classical_monument palace box, cottage proportions. Use stupa/spire finial at top, NOT western dome.
